Family Tree Analyzer

Analyse, explore and improve your family tree. Find errors, research census records, visualise ancestors on maps — free Windows app and browser-based web app.

The Tree Tops Report will show you who is the furthest back person for a given surname line.

You can ignore countries or you can select a specific country, and select various relationship types.
